# Testing Workflow

<!-- generated by open-maintainer; sourceProfileVersion=1; profileHash=faddd7aa612a49d7 -->

## Use when

- Use when changing tests or running validation in source/open-maintainer.

## Do not use when

- Starting a broad implementation; use the start-task skill first.
- Reviewing another author's completed diff; use the PR review skill.

## Read first

- The changed source file.
- Nearby tests or fixtures for the changed behavior.
- Package manifests, tsconfig, and CI workflow files that define validation.
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- docs/DEMO_RUNBOOK.md
- docs/MVP_RELEASE_REVIEW.md
- docs/ROADMAP.md
- local-docs/MVP_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
- local-docs/PRODUCT_PRD.md
- local-docs/SKILLS_GENERATION.md
- local-docs/TECH_STACK.md

## Workflow

1. Map the changed surface to the narrowest relevant validation command.
2. Add or update regression coverage for behavior changes and bug fixes.
3. Run focused tests first, then broader checks when the change crosses contracts or packages.
4. If a command needs unavailable services, record the skipped command and reason.

## Validation

- dev: cd apps/api && bun --watch src/server.ts (apps/api/package.json)
- build: cd apps/api && tsc -p tsconfig.json (apps/api/package.json)
- build: cd apps/cli && tsc -p tsconfig.json (apps/cli/package.json)
- dev: cd apps/web && next dev -H 0.0.0.0 -p ${WEB_PORT:-3000} (apps/web/package.json)
- build: cd apps/web && next build (apps/web/package.json)
- dev: cd apps/worker && bun --watch src/worker.ts (apps/worker/package.json)
- build: cd apps/worker && tsc -p tsconfig.json (apps/worker/package.json)
- lint: biome check . (package.json)
- format: biome format --write . (package.json)
- typecheck: tsc -b (package.json)
- test: vitest run (package.json)
- build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/db build && bun run --cwd packages/config build && bun run --cwd packages/github build && bun run --cwd packages/analyzer build && bun run --cwd packages/ai build && bun run --cwd packages/context build && bun run --cwd apps/cli build && bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/worker build && bun run --cwd apps/web build (package.json)
- diagnostics: bun run tests/smoke/local-health.ts (package.json)
- smoke:compose: bun run tests/smoke/compose-smoke.ts (package.json)
- smoke:mvp: bun run tests/smoke/mvp-demo.ts (package.json)
- build: cd packages/ai && tsc -p tsconfig.json (packages/ai/package.json)
- build: cd packages/analyzer && tsc -p tsconfig.json (packages/analyzer/package.json)
- build: cd packages/config && tsc -p tsconfig.json (packages/config/package.json)
- build: cd packages/context && tsc -p tsconfig.json (packages/context/package.json)
- build: cd packages/db && tsc -p tsconfig.json (packages/db/package.json)
- build: cd packages/github && tsc -p tsconfig.json (packages/github/package.json)
- build: cd packages/shared && tsc -p tsconfig.json (packages/shared/package.json)
- test: cd tests/fixtures/high-readiness-ts && vitest run (tests/fixtures/high-readiness-ts/package.json)
- lint: cd tests/fixtures/high-readiness-ts && biome check . (tests/fixtures/high-readiness-ts/package.json)
- build: cd tests/fixtures/high-readiness-ts && tsc -b (tests/fixtures/high-readiness-ts/package.json)
- dev: cd tests/fixtures/low-context-ts && bun src/server.ts (tests/fixtures/low-context-ts/package.json)
- test: cd tests/fixtures/low-context-ts && vitest run (tests/fixtures/low-context-ts/package.json)
- build: cd tests/fixtures/low-context-ts && tsc -b (tests/fixtures/low-context-ts/package.json)
- lint: cd tests/fixtures/low-context-ts && biome check . (tests/fixtures/low-context-ts/package.json)
- test: cd tests/fixtures/missing-context-ts && vitest run (tests/fixtures/missing-context-ts/package.json)
- lint: cd tests/fixtures/missing-context-ts && biome check . (tests/fixtures/missing-context-ts/package.json)
- build: cd tests/fixtures/missing-context-ts && tsc -b (tests/fixtures/missing-context-ts/package.json)
- test: cd tests/fixtures/with-context && vitest run (tests/fixtures/with-context/package.json)

## Documentation

- Check or update CONTRIBUTING.md when behavior changes.
- Check or update docs/DEMO_RUNBOOK.md when behavior changes.
- Check or update docs/MVP_RELEASE_REVIEW.md when behavior changes.
- Check or update docs/ROADMAP.md when behavior changes.
- Check or update local-docs/MVP_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md when behavior changes.
- Check or update local-docs/PRODUCT_PRD.md when behavior changes.
- Check or update local-docs/SKILLS_GENERATION.md when behavior changes.
- Check or update local-docs/TECH_STACK.md when behavior changes.

## Risk checks

- Not detected; treat auth, write paths, generated files, deployment, and lockfiles with caution.
- Use bun for dependency and script commands.
- Run `cd apps/api && tsc -p tsconfig.json` before finishing changes that affect build.
- Run `cd apps/cli && tsc -p tsconfig.json` before finishing changes that affect build.
- Run `cd apps/web && next build` before finishing changes that affect build.
- Run `cd apps/worker && tsc -p tsconfig.json` before finishing changes that affect build.
- Run `biome check .` before finishing changes that affect lint.
- Run `tsc -b` before finishing changes that affect typecheck.
- Run `vitest run` before finishing changes that affect test.

## Done when

- The changed surface is clear.
- Required files were read before editing or reviewing.
- Relevant tests, docs, and validation were updated or explicitly ruled out.
- Final notes include commands run and any skipped checks.
